vocab.example: Sorry for the technical issue at the start of the call.
vocab.example_vi: Xin lỗi vì sự cố kỹ thuật lúc đầu cuộc gọi.

vocab.example: I have a stable connection now, so we can continue.
vocab.example_vi: Bây giờ tôi đã có kết nối ổn định, chúng ta có thể tiếp tục.

vocab.example: Would you like me to screen share my portfolio?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có muốn tôi chia sẻ màn hình danh mục dự án của mình không?

vocab.example: Try to keep eye contact with the camera during video interviews.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cố gắng giao tiếp bằng mắt với camera trong buổi phỏng vấn qua video.

vocab.meaning_vi: bối cảnh (không gian) chuyên nghiệp phía sau
vocab.example: Make sure you have a quiet, professional background for the call.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy đảm bảo bạn có một không gian phía sau yên tĩnh, chuyên nghiệp cho cuộc gọi.

vocab.example: Please mute your microphone when you're not speaking.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng tắt tiếng micro khi bạn không nói.

vocab.example: I'll send you a link to join the call.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ gửi bạn đường link để tham gia cuộc gọi.

vocab.example: Let's wrap up the interview with any questions you have.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy kết thúc buổi phỏng vấn với các câu hỏi bạn có.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Hi Tuan, thanks for joining the call. Can you hear me clearly?

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, I can hear you well. Sorry for the technical issue earlier.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: No problem, we have a stable connection now, so let's start.

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Great, I'm ready whenever you are.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Could you tell me a bit about your professional background?

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Sure, I've worked as a developer for four years now.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Would you like to screen share your portfolio for us?

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, one moment, let me share my screen now.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Thank you. Please try to keep eye contact with the camera too.

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Of course, I'll do my best to stay focused on the camera.

lines.speaker: Trang (interviewer)
lines.text: Great, let's wrap up the interview with one last question.

lines.speaker: Tuan (candidate)
lines.text: Sure, I'm happy to answer anything else you need.

questions.q: What problem happened at the start of the call?
What does Trang ask Tuan to share?
What does Trang remind Tuan to do during the call?
options: Keep eye contact with the camera

shadowing: Sorry for the technical issue, but I have a stable connection now.
I've worked as a software developer for four years at my company.
I'll share my screen so you can see my recent project.
I always try to keep eye contact with the camera during interviews.
Thank you for your time, I'm happy to answer any more questions.
